expectations.evidence: proposal.md written to openspec/changes/task-comments/proposal.md. Covers Why (no inline task discussion), What Changes (CommentController, TaskComments.vue tab, routes), two capabilities (task-comments new, tasks delta for comment count).

Two spec files created: specs/task-comments/spec.md (5 REQs: TC-001 list, TC-002 post, TC-003 delete, TC-004 display, TC-005 count badge) and specs/tasks/spec.md (delta adding REQ-TC-005-TASK comment count badge). Existing openspec/specs/tasks.md consulted before writing to avoid duplication.

design.md created with 4 key decisions: ICommentsManager over OpenRegister (no register table for comments), thin PHP controller layer, batch comment-count endpoint to avoid N+1, local ref() state in TaskComments.vue over Pinia store. Delete-authorization risk callout included.

tasks.md created with 13 implementation tasks across 6 groups (CommentController, routes, TaskComments.vue component, tab wiring, comment count badge, PHPUnit tests), each with @spec references to the new spec REQs.

expectations.text: Loads ARCHITECTURE.md, FEATURES.md, ADRs for context
expectations.evidence: ARCHITECTURE.md confirmed ICommentsManager usage pattern (objectType: planix_task). FEATURES.md confirmed MVP #38 tier for comments. Context loaded before subagent invocation; subagent received full context in prompt and used it to make ICommentsManager/Schema.org/thin-controller decisions.

notes: Real run 2026-04-28. planix task-comments change. Notable: openspec CLI failed with 'Unknown schema conduction' — skill handled by retrying with --schema spec-driven flag (found by reading how spec-driven schema was available). All 4 artifacts created; openspec status shows isComplete: true. DEFERRED_QUESTIONS from subagent: (1) fetchCommentCounts in tasks store vs new comments store — chose tasks store for MVP; (2) relative-time library — assumed @nextcloud/moment.
